name: Arion banki hf.
summary: Arion banki hf. provides various financial services to households, corporates, and investors in Iceland and internationally. It operates through three segments: Retail Banking, Corporate & Investment Banking, and Markets. The Retail Banking segment offers a range of products and services, including mortgage loans, savings and current accounts, vehicle and equipment financing, factoring, payment cards, pension services, and insurance and funds to individuals and SMEs through a network of 19 branches with approximately 100,000 customers. The Corporate & Investment Banking segment provides a range of lending products, such as guarantees, deposit accounts, payment solutions, and value-added digital solutions to large and medium-sized corporate clients and investors; international transactions; and various financial advisory and capital raising services, including M&A and LBO services, as well as financial structuring advice, and services on public offerings of securities. The Markets segment manages financial assets on behalf of its customers, as well as a range of mutual, investment, and institutional investor funds; administers pension funds; and provides various fixed income services and risk management products. The company also offers liquidity, currency, and interest rate management services, as well as handles various debt issuance in the domestic and foreign markets, and maintaining its credit ratings; provides non-life and life insurance; and invests in properties. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Reykjav√É¬≠k, Iceland.
